skill_availability_goal: Verify that feature-implementor accepts matching 4-level PRD/TRD documents and writes the mirrored IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN gate before coding.
prompt: docs/pm/chat-interface/messages/history/search/PRD.md 和 docs/engineer/chat-interface/messages/history/search/TRD.md 已确认。请进入 feature-implementor，为消息历史搜索实现写实施计划；先不要改代码。
